app_language_help: The language used for the Lukaisu Server user interface. Changes apply after saving and reloading the page.
words_to_do_buttons_help: Which bulk-action buttons appear on the reading screen for unknown words: just "I Know All", or also "Ignore All".
tooltips_help: Style of the popup that appears when hovering a word while reading.
translations_per_page_help: How many machine-translation suggestions to fetch per page when looking up a new term.
display_next_review_after_help: Waiting time after assessment to display next review
clear_edit_frame_after_help: Waiting time to clear the message/edit frame
navigate_term_statuses_help: Visit saved terms with these statuses via keystrokes (RIGHT, SPACE, LEFT, etc.)
show_translations_for_help: Display translations of terms with these statuses
review_sentence_count_help: Number of sentences displayed from text during review
term_sentence_count_help: Number of sentences generated from text for terms
similar_terms_count_help: Similar terms displayed while adding/editing a term
translation_delimiters_help: Characters that delimit different translations (used in annotation selection)
save_audio_checkbox_label: Enable saving TTS audio files to disk
browser_voice_settings_help: These settings are stored in your browser and apply per language.
voice_help: Available voices depend on your web browser
voice_storage_help: Voice settings are stored in your browser's local storage
texts_per_page_help: Number of rows shown on the active texts list.
archived_texts_per_page_help: Number of rows shown on the archived texts list.
terms_per_page_help: Number of vocabulary entries shown per page on the terms list.
tags_per_page_help: Number of tags shown per page on the tag management screens.
feed_articles_per_page_help: Number of articles to display when browsing a single newsfeed.
feeds_per_page_help: Number of feeds shown per page on the newsfeeds list.
query_mode_help: How filter boxes interpret your input: plain text matching or full regular expressions.
